source.default: SELECT [Id] as [Value], [Value] as [Text] FROM [db_default].[Tags] WHERE FarmId = @FarmId and IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY 2
source.sqlite: SELECT [Id] as [Value], [Value] as [Text] FROM [db_default_Tags] WHERE FarmId = @FarmId and IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY 2

select.default: (SELECT STRING_AGG(VALUE+';'+COLOR, '|') FROM db_default.AnimalsTags ATAG_1 INNER JOIN db_default.Tags TAG_1 ON ATAG.TagId = TAG.Id WHERE ATAG.AnimalId = A_1.Id AND ATAG.IsDeleted = 0)
select.sqlite: (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(VALUE+';'+COLOR, '|') FROM db_default_AnimalsTags ATAG_1 INNER JOIN db_default_Tags TAG_1 ON ATAG.TagId = TAG.Id WHERE ATAG.AnimalId = A_1.Id AND ATAG.IsDeleted = 0)

where.default: (SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM db_default.AnimalsTags ATAG_1 INNER JOIN db_default.Tags TAG_1 ON ATAG.TagId = TAG.Id WHERE ATAG.AnimalId = A_1.Id AND ATAG.IsDeleted = 0)
where.sqlite: (SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM db_default_AnimalsTags ATAG_1 INNER JOIN db_default_Tags TAG_1 ON ATAG.TagId = TAG.Id WHERE ATAG.AnimalId = A_1.Id AND ATAG.IsDeleted = 0)
